items.title: Marketplace Reveal
items.excerpt: Ipoii uploaded a showcase of the marketplace
items.body:
DM:Odyssey has a unique custom marketplace. Gone are the days of browsing bazaars, using Discord Bots and the official market place.

In it's place is a proper marketplace that allows to buy/sell items. You can also see market statistics, with a full guide on the market place in-game. Additionally, a sneak peak of the CROWN item was visible in the market place making it far easier to buy/sell crowns.

items.title: Login QoL
items.excerpt: Ipoii uploaded a teaser about login QoL
items.body: DM:Odyssey allows you to save your login information and even auto-login to your last tamer!

items.title: Inventory update
items.excerpt: Ipoii uploaded a teasert about inventory space
items.body:
DM:Odyssey provides a much larger base inventory with an extremely large warehouse. Additionally, Extra Inventory was added for:

  • Seals
  • DigiEggs
  • Material
  • Quests
  • Evolution
  • Digivice & Chipsets
  • Skills

items.title: Additional Action/Hotbar space
items.excerpt: Ipoii uploaded a teaser about expanded hotbar space
items.body:
DM:Odyssey supports additional action/hotbar space slots from F9/9-F12/=.

This is due to the new custom skills digimon have, role skills and new items.

items.title: New QoL info!
items.excerpt: Ipoii uploaded info on brand new QoL!
items.body:
This server supports a ton of QoL improvements, here's a few!

  • Auto-Cloning
  • Walk around by just clicking on the map
  • Hide all players (with filters for friends, party and guild!)
  • Raid Teleport immediately to any raid from anywhere to anywhere!
  • Loot tables are now visible on the map per digimon!
  • Mob Find on the map lets you travel straight to a digimon, it'll even port you there!
  • Gear comparison right in the UI by hovering over gear

items.title: Combat Teaser!
items.excerpt: Ipoii uploaded a preview of combat!
items.body: Digimon Odyssey has a completely different combat experience. Various traditional MMO classes such as tanks, supports, and ranged/melee/caster are available as well as Hybrid for advanced players.

items.title: Questing Teaser!
items.excerpt: Ipoii uploaded a preview of questing!
items.body: The new questing system supports being able to easily travel between maps and simply click to go to the quest objective.

items.title: Official Discord open
items.body:
Digimon Masters Odyssey has been announced with an beta launching on March 14th!

You can join the Discord server here to get the latest updates and news.
